variables.name: effectiveness
variables.label: When does this power become effective?

body.heading: Designation of Agent
body.text: I, {{principalName}}, appoint {{agentName}} as my agent (attorney-in-fact) to act for me in any lawful way with respect to the powers granted in this document.

body.heading: Successor Agent
body.text: If {{agentName}} dies, becomes legally disabled, resigns, or refuses to act, I appoint {{successorAgentName}} as successor agent.

body.heading: Durability and Effectiveness
body.text: This power of attorney is not affected by my subsequent disability or incapacity. Effectiveness as selected by the principal: {{effectiveness}}.

body.heading: Execution
body.text: Texas law requires this instrument to be acknowledged before a notary public. It is signed on the date of acknowledgment set out in the notarial certificate.
